name: @moolam/training-distillation
description: Teacher distillation through the production runtime harness (anti-cheat: same grammar as student serving).

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @moolam/sync-protocol run build && pnpm --filter @moolam/learning run build && pnpm --filter @moolam/runtime-harness run build && pnpm --filter @moolam/training-corpus run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test tests/generate_traces.test.mjs tests/grammar_filter.test.mjs tests/distillation_manifest.test.mjs tests/score_traces.test.mjs tests/refusal_balance.test.mjs
